title: Deconovo Blackout Curtains Bedroom Super Soft Thermal Insulated Eyelet Blackout Curtains for Living Room 46 x 54 Inch Black 2 Panels
features: READY MADE – 2 curtain panels per pack (each panel 117 cm wide x 138 cm long) with 4cm eyelets, easy to hang; measure your curtain pole (not the window), choose total curtains width 1.5–2 times your pole, and measure drop from the pole to where you want the curtains to end.

PREMIUM TEXTURE - Features a lightweight soft touch mate texture and perfectly executed stitches, this indoor bedroom curtains are sold ready to hang. This decorative eyelet blackout curtains for bedroom, living room and kids room dresses your window beautifully and add a touch of magic and modernity to your room.

BLACKOUT EFFECT - Deconovo thermal blackout curtains are manufactured using innovative triple weave technology (Dark colours work better). Bedroom blackout curtains will block 95%–99% of light, stopping the outside world from creeping into your private moments.
ENERGY SAVING - Bedroom blackout curtains will help on reducing energy bills by keeping light out and cool homes during hot summers and keeping the cold out during the winter months.

EASY CARE - Machine washable. Gentle cycle, warm iron. Do not bleach, do not tumble dry. If there are wrinkles, you just need to hang for a while or iron it in warm temperature, the wrinkles will gradually disappear. At Deconovo, our customer service is only one e-mail away to help you choose the size and solve ALL your after sales issues.
description: Product Description Are the colours in the photos accurate? We strive to display true colours, but actual shades may vary due to monitor settings and lighting conditions. The curtain size seems slightly off – is that normal? Yes, that can happen. Our curtains are hand-cut, so there may be a slight measurement error of 3–5 cm (1–2 inches). This is within the normal manufacturing tolerance and should not affect the overall look or function of the curtains. Is the size in the title for one curtain or both? The size shown in the title refers to one single curtain panel. Our curtains are sold in pairs (2 panels per package), so you will receive two panels of the listed size. Why is my curtain shorter than expected? You might measured ONLY the window height — curtains MUST be sized to your INSTALLATION POINT (rod to floor/windowsill), including hardware height; ALWAYS measure YOUR space BEFORE buying to avoid short curtains. Do the curtains come with the rods, or do I need to purchase them separately? This product includes the curtains only. The curtain rods need to be purchased separately. We do have curtain rods available for purchase in our store – please scroll down further on this page for details. Deconovo Curtain Poles Series Heavy Duty Curtain Poles Set Curtain Rods with Finial Adjustable Curtain Rails Package Contains Curtain poles, brackets, bracket screws, wall plugs Package Contains Curtain rods, mounting brackets, elegant finials, and all the necessary hardware Package Contains One set of 25mm diameter curtain rods, brackets, 2 finials, and other hardware Size Options 76cm, 76-116cm, 76-157cm, 76-198cm, 76-236cm,76-365cm Size Options 76-122cm, 122-213cm, 168-305cm Size Options 76-122cm, 122-213cm, 168-305cm

product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: The Deconovo blackout curtains are recommended for use in various rooms including bedrooms, living rooms, children's rooms, dining rooms, and kitchens. They are particularly suitable for late sleepers, shift workers, seniors, parents, students, and computer operators who require a dark environment to ensure a good night's sleep or to reduce glare from computer screens.
